Bash(curl -s http://localhost:8003/getSummaryResults | python3 -c "
import json, sys
d = json.load\(sys.stdin\)
print\('total_tomato_count       :', d['total_tomato_count']\)
print\('total_flower_count       :', d['total_flower_count']\)
print\('measured_tomato_count    :', d['measured_tomato_count']\)
print\('total_measured_weight_g  :', d['total_measured_weight_g']\)
print\('measured_weight_by_class :', d['measured_weight_by_class']\)
keys = set\(d.keys\(\)\)
required = {'total_tomatoes','total_flowers','total_tomato_count','total_flower_count',
            'rows','measured_weight_by_class','measured_tomato_count','total_measured_weight_g'}
assert required <= keys, f'Missing keys: {required - keys}'
print\('All required keys present ✓'\)
" 2>&1)

Bash(curl -s -X POST http://localhost:8001/demoClassify \\
  -F "images=@rgb-tomato-test-image.jpg" \\
  -F "confidence_threshold=0.25" \\
  -F "tomato_track=remote" \\
  -F "flower_track=remote" \\
  -F "depth_image=@depth_raw-tomato-test-image.npy" \\
  -F "fx=618.390381" \\
  -F "fy=618.522888" \\
  -F "depth_scale=0.001" \\
  | python3 -c "
import json, sys
d = json.load\(sys.stdin\)
depth = d['depth_analysis']
print\(f'depth_enabled: {depth[\\"depth_enabled\\"]}'\)
print\(f'total        : {depth[\\"total\\"]}'\)
total_g = 0
for t in depth['tomatoes']:
    assert 'weight_g' in t, f'weight_g missing from tomato {t[\\"id\\"]}'
    assert t['weight_g'] is not None
    expected = round\(t['volume_cm3'] * 0.95, 4\)
    assert abs\(t['weight_g'] - expected\) < 0.0001, f'weight mismatch: {t}'
    total_g += t['weight_g']
    print\(f'  #{t[\\"id\\"]} {t[\\"label\\"]:10s}  vol={t[\\"volume_cm3\\"]} cm³  weight={t[\\"weight_g\\"]} g'\)
print\(f'\\nTotal: {total_g:.2f} g = {total_g/1000:.4f} kg'\)
print\('PASS'\)
" 2>&1)
